candidatePool.description: Players from the Joe Knows Ball HR model who recorded at least one plate appearance or at-bat in a completed MLB game during the previous four Eastern Time calendar days.

dailyProfile.interpretation: Universal Day 25/7 — 1–4–7 family dominant. Countercurrent at 2. Balancing complement at 3. Patterns are documented, not guaranteed.
